title: Safe list access with bounds precondition
description: safe_get requires index to be in bounds, eliminating runtime panics.
prompt: Write a Kodo module with a safe_get(lst: List<Int>, idx: Int) -> Int function that requires idx >= 0 && idx < lst.length. Print safe_get([10,20,30,40], 0) and safe_get([10,20,30,40], 3).
